svg.title: Production readiness checklist
svg.desc: What is missing to make the trades API and MCP server production grade, organized by category

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I add API key authentication to my FastAPI trades API?')

svg.text: No authentication on FastAPI or MCP server
No API keys or JWT tokens
DB password in plain env vars (use secrets)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I add structured logging and monitoring to FastAPI?')

svg.text: No request tracing or correlation IDs
No health check details (DB ping, uptime)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What database migrations tool should I use with FastAPI and PostgreSQL?')

svg.text: No connection retry logic on startup
No indexes beyond symbol and timestamp

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I add retry logic and circuit breakers to FastAPI?')
sendPrompt('What API design improvements should I make for a production trades API?')

svg.text: No date range filtering on get_trades

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I set up CI/CD and testing for a FastAPI and MCP server project?')

svg.text: No unit tests for tools or endpoints
No integration tests against test DB
No automated deploys on merge to main
Fix critical first before any real traffic
1. Add API key auth to FastAPI (1 hour)
6. Add date range filter to get_trades (30 min)
